# Manara Consultancy

> An advisory house guiding companies, individuals and scholars through the
> decisions that define them. Strategy for businesses, direction for careers.
> Rooted in Beirut, working across Lebanon, the Gulf, Europe and North America.

Manara Consultancy provides business strategy, AI, web and career advisory
services to startups, SMEs, family businesses and professionals across the
MENA region and the Gulf. Ten years of practice.

## Locations and markets served
Beirut, Lebanon (headquarters) - London - New York - Toronto - Dubai, UAE.
Markets covered: Lebanon and the Levant, Saudi Arabia, the United Arab
Emirates, Qatar, Kuwait, Jordan, Egypt, and francophone Africa.

## Services

- [Business Consulting](https://manaraconsultancy.online/business-consulting.html): strategy, market entry, growth advisory, market research. From $150 per session.
- [Startup Consultancy](https://manaraconsultancy.online/startup-consulting.html): business plans, go-to-market, investor pitches. From $200.
- [AI Consulting & Agents](https://manaraconsultancy.online/ai-consulting.html): AI agents, chatbots on WhatsApp, workflow automation. Strategy from $150, agent design from $300, implementation from $700.
- [Web Design & Development](https://manaraconsultancy.online/web-design.html): fast, mobile-first, multilingual websites and e-commerce. Priced per project.
- [Content Calendar](https://manaraconsultancy.online/content-calendar.html): planned, written and automated social content. From $150/month.
- [LinkedIn Management](https://manaraconsultancy.online/linkedin-management.html): executive and personal branding. From $250/month.
- [Career Coaching](https://manaraconsultancy.online/career-consulting.html): coaching, CV development, interview preparation. From $100 per session.
- [HR Consultancy](https://manaraconsultancy.online/hr-consulting.html): roles, structure, hiring and people operations.
- [Legal Consultancy](https://manaraconsultancy.online/law-consulting.html): contracts and commercial legal support.
- [Fashion Consultancy](https://manaraconsultancy.online/fashion-consulting.html): wardrobe, styling and personal presentation.
- [Shipping & Freight](https://manaraconsultancy.online/shipping-freight.html): import and export clearance, 75+ destinations.
- [Solar Energy](https://manaraconsultancy.online/solar-energy.html): sizing, storage and installation advisory.
- [Water Solutions](https://manaraconsultancy.online/water-solutions.html): treatment and supply advisory.
- [Tender Support](https://manaraconsultancy.online/tender.html): bid and tender preparation.

## Free tools

- [Brand Signal Audit](https://manaraconsultancy.online/audit-lab.html): a free instant scan of how a business shows up online, using real Lighthouse data.

English, French, Arabic.
